# ADR NNNN: Title (imperative, present tense)

- Status: Proposed | Accepted | Superseded by ADR-XXXX
- Date: YYYY-MM-DD
- Context: link to issue/PR/discussion

## Context

What is the problem or force prompting a decision? Include constraints (budget,
runtime, team) and what alternatives were considered.

## Decision

The decision, stated plainly in one or two sentences.

## Rationale

Why this option won. Reference evidence (benchmarks, incompatibilities, issue
ground rules) rather than taste where possible.

## Consequences

What becomes easier, what becomes harder, what should trigger revisiting this
decision.
